innateAbility.name: M.A.D.
innateAbility.description: Passively grants bonus mana regeneration corresponding to Techies' current max mana.

abilities.name: Sticky Bomb
abilities.description: Lobs a Sticky Bomb toward the area-targeted location.Once the bomb latches itself to an enemy hero within proximity, it applies a movement speed slow.

abilities.name: Reactive Tazer
abilities.description: Triggers an electric charge, granting the Techies team bonus movement speed for a short time.

abilities.name: Detonate Tazer
abilities.description: Instantly detonates Reactive Tazer and apply all its ability effects.

abilities.name: Blast Off!
abilities.description: Hurls themselves into the enemy's midst, deals massive area damage, and stuns enemy units within the radius upon landing.

abilities.name: Minefield Sign
abilities.description: Places a warning sign! Creates a minefield in the area-targeted location upon cast.The entire minefield is activated once a valid enemy hero is within its proximity radius, and deals damage to all moving enemy units within the minefield radius.The Minefield Sign is destroyed when the duration ends.

abilities.name: Proximity Mines
abilities.description: Plants an invisible mine that cannot be detected by certain True Sight sources.The mine is visible to enemy units within the mine proc radius, and detonates if an enemy unit is standing within the proc radius for a period of time.
